name: Plain Tomato Sauce I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeIngredient: Tomatoes, Italian Blend (1 34 ounce can, drained and coarsely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add chopped garlic and onion to the pan and sauté until fragrant, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the drained and coarsely chopped tomatoes, parsley, salt, pepper, and oregano.
4. Reduce heat to low and add butter, stirring occasionally.
5. Simmer uncovered for 15-20 minutes, adjusting seasoning as needed before serving.
